text:
pathological anxiety in 30% of them. THE 10 COMMANDMENTS

Bring the disease into remission
Wean off corticosteroids
Stop smoking

WHAT CARE OPTIONS ARE POSSIBLE?
Eat a normal, varied diet
Correct anemia
Correct identified deficiencies
Assess (only with the practitioner) the relevance of reducing medication doses, stopping them, or switching them

Alongside specific treatments such as anxiolytics or antidepressants, whose prescription should be discussed with the referring practitioner and, if possible, a psychiatrist, psychotherapeutic interventions are possible.
Specifically address psychological problems (health coaching, drug treatments, psychotherapy)
Avoid social isolation: limit hospitalizations, keep working, go out, love.

It has been shown that brief solution-focused therapy is effective for fatigue associated with IBD.
Exercise: any kind, but regularly, resuming progressively,
